title: Enderman Enhanced
description: Enderman Enhanced is an simple resource pack that enhance the default Endermans outdated look!
body:
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1261039510221754389?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=ffffff&label=discord&labelColor=5865f2&color=707bf3)](https://discord.gg/yNuPcwesgY) ![Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/available_for_minecraft-1.18.2--1.21-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=ffffff&labelColor=%233c2a57&color=%2362488a) [![Profile](https://img.shields.io/badge/e-donations-40b8ff?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&logoColor=ffffff&label=ko-fi&labelColor=ee8b93&color=ffffff)](https://ko-fi.com/thefabstercraft) ##
## ABOUT 🔍 This resource pack adds a simple re-texture to the Enderman as seen below! Keep in mind there is two versions and you can choose which one you'd like to download. The resource pack is completely compatible with [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by FreshLX, and I highly reccomend using it alongside my resource pack, just make sure to have this resource pack on top of Fresh Animations in the load order, see the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enderman-enhanced/gallery) tab for the example on what the load order should look like, as well as what the resource pack looks like with the Fresh Animations resource pack. Additionally, while this resource pack does not require [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)/[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) & [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) to work properly, you will need one of these two methods if you want the Fresh Animations compatibility. The resource pack was made mainly for 1.20.1 but should work as intended on all other versions! If you run into any issues please leave a comment or contact me via one of my socials below or join my discord [here!](https://discord.gg/yNuPcwesgY) ![Versions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3290c5f442e5dc29f75452848e8bf572334a9adf.png) ## DISCLAIMER❗
### With this resource pack you MAY: ✅ Add to your modpacks and make videos on with proper credit. ✅ Modify for personal use. ✅ Use a modified version in modpacks and videos as long as the modified version is not publicly available. ✅ Transform, remix and add to the assets with proper credit. ### With this resource pack you MAY NOT: ❌ Post files and claim as your own. ❌ Post files on a paid product. ❌ Make an unofficial page for the resource pack claiming it as yours.
## SOCIALS 👀 ## CREDITS ⭐
Credits The Fresh Animations resource pack was used in the screenshots tab, check it out [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)! The shaders used in the screenshots tab can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/shader/super-duper-vanilla)!
